rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) is unrelated to Educ. Code §22.0832, which governs criminal history record reviews for charter school employees. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: The agency shall review the national criminal history record information of an employee of an open-enrollment charter school to whom Section 12.1059 applies in the same manner as the State Board for Educator Certification reviews certified educators under Section 22.0831.
_note: Rule text concerns charter school employee background checks; no nexus to property tax homestead exemption.
